What We Offer
SERVICES &
PRICING

Every job is different — these are rough estimates. Text us for a free exact quote. No obligation, no pressure.

01
Driveway & Walkway
Complete pressure wash stripping oil stains, dirt, and discoloration from concrete or pavers.
~$80–120
Rough estimate
02
Patio, Pool Deck & Tile
Wood, concrete, pavers, or tile — cleaned and restored. Removes mold, algae, and years of buildup.
~$110–180
Rough estimate
03
Fence Washing
Wood or vinyl fencing cleaned top to bottom — restores original color and adds instant curb appeal.
~$75–120
Rough estimate
04
House Siding
Soft-wash or pressure wash for all siding types. Safe for paint, stucco, vinyl, and wood.
~$175–300
Rough estimate
05
Roof Soft Wash
Low-pressure cleaning that eliminates moss, algae, and black streaks without damaging shingles.
~$200–350
Rough estimate
06
Full Property Package
Driveway, patios, walkways, fencing — the whole exterior in one visit. Best value.
~$350–500
Rough estimate
